{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = The Weeping Dragon’s breath
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Weeping [[Dragon's breath]] is a technique that releases burning liquid light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
